risks.title: Security file modified without visibility
risks.evidence: Security.tsx changed at 2026-04-27T19:02:39Z with duplicate events indicating rapid modifications
risks.recommendedAction: Immediately review Security.tsx changes to ensure no vulnerabilities were introduced; check for auth, secrets, or permission logic alterations

risks.title: Multiple duplicate events suggest batch changes
risks.evidence: 4 events logged within 17ms interval, with pairs marked as duplicates
risks.recommendedAction: Investigate if changes were bulk-applied or if event system needs deduplication tuning

opportunities.title: Strengthen security code review process
opportunities.evidence: Security module changes detected; current workflow lacks automated security validation gates
opportunities.suggestedAction: Add pre-commit hooks or CI security tests (ESLint security plugin, dependency scanning) to catch issues before review

opportunities.title: Document security module patterns
opportunities.evidence: Security.tsx is core sensitive file; unclear if standards are enforced
opportunities.suggestedAction: Create security module guidelines and add linting rules to prevent auth/permission antipatterns

taskCandidates.title: Review Security.tsx changes
taskCandidates.description: Examine diffs in src/screens/Security.tsx from last 2 commits. Verify no hardcoded secrets, proper auth checks, and permission validations remain intact.
taskCandidates.rationale: Security file modifications pose immediate risk; manual review is essential before merge

taskCandidates.title: Run security tests
taskCandidates.description: Execute existing security and unit tests targeting Security module. Check for test coverage regressions.
taskCandidates.rationale: Suggested by code-observer; validates changes don't break security invariants

taskCandidates.title: Deduplicate event stream
taskCandidates.description: Investigate duplicate event logging from code-observer. Adjust timestamp thresholds or event deduplication logic.
taskCandidates.rationale: Reduces noise; helps distinguish actual vs. spurious changes in future analysis

recommendations.title: Add security file watchers to CI/CD
recommendations.rationale: Security.tsx is a critical asset; changes should trigger mandatory code review + automated security scanning
recommendations.action: Create GH Actions workflow: on changes to src/screens/Security.* → run ESLint security rules, SAST scan, require human approval before merge

recommendations.title: Implement secrets scanning
recommendations.rationale: Duplicate events suggest possible rapid commits; risk of accidental secret commits is elevated
recommendations.action: Enable pre-commit hooks (e.g., truffleHog, git-secrets) and repository secret scanning in GitHub settings

pendingApprovals.reason: Sensitive proactive task requires approval: Review Security.tsx changes
